items.title: A 20-minute pitch wins Indian startup Pronto backing from Lachy Groom
items.summary: The investment comes as Pronto scales to 26,000 daily bookings and the market heads toward a potential $18 billion size.

items.title: Barry Diller trusts Sam Altman. But ‘trust is irrelevant’ as AGI nears, he says.
items.summary: Barry Diller defended OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, while warning that AGI remains an unpredictable force needing guardrails.

items.title: Snap says its $400M deal with Perplexity ‘amicably ended’
items.summary: The deal, announced last November, would have seen Perplexity's AI search engine integrated directly into Snapchat.

items.title: Is xAI a neocloud now?
items.summary: xAI's real business may be more about building data centers than training AI models.

items.title: Insurance startup Corgi hits $1.3B valuation 4 months after its Series A
items.summary: Corgi announced on Wednesday a $160 million Series B, led by TCV, valuing the startup at $1.3 billion.

items.title: Microsoft’s AI data center push is colliding with its clean power goals
items.summary: The push for new data centers at Microsoft is putting its key clean power goals at risk.

items.title: Robinhood’s venture fund IPO attracted 150,000+ retail investors, CEO says
items.summary: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev says more than 150,000 retail investors joined the fintech’s new venture fund, which offers exposure to private tech companies like OpenAI, Stripe, Databricks, and Oura before they go public.

items.title: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
items.summary: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.

items.title: DOJ says ransomware gang tapped into Russian government databases
items.summary: U.S. prosecutors said a ransomware gang fueled Russian government corruption, and allowed the gang's leaders to avoid paying taxes and dodge the country's military draft.

items.title: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirms breach, tells every customer to rotate sensitive keys
items.summary: Braintrust, a startup that makes an “operating system for engineers building AI software,” notified customers that hackers broke into one of its Amazon cloud environments, and is asking customers to rotate their API keys.

items.title: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
items.summary: The project would be a "multi-phase, next-generation, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility," according to the proposal.

items.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
items.summary: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like those from OpenAI and Anthropic.

items.title: Chrome on Android now supports approximate instead of precise location sharing
items.summary: The new feature is a small win for Android users, as it gives them more control over how much location data they share with websites.

items.title: Google updates AI search to include quotes from Reddit and other sources
items.summary: While citing web forums and discussion boards can help users find answers to more niche queries, this design choice could also prove chaotic.

items.title: Khosla-backed robotics startup Genesis AI has gone full stack, demo shows
items.summary: Genesis AI, a startup that raised a $105 million seed round to build foundational AI for robotics, has unveiled its first model, GENE-26.5, but also a demo showcasing a set of robotic hands performing complex tasks.

items.title: Tinder owner Match Group is slowing hiring to pay for its increased use of AI tools
items.summary: Match Group said that it's slowing its hiring plans for the rest of the year because AI tools "cost a lot of money."

items.title: Apple to pay $250M to settle lawsuit over Siri’s delayed AI features
items.summary: Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle a class action lawsuit for overpromising the arrival of Siri's AI features.

items.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
items.summary: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

items.title: Aurora lands McLane deal to run driverless truck routes in Texas
items.summary: Aurora said it plans to expand to new routes between McLane distribution centers across the U.S. Sun Belt by the end of 2026.

items.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, all your M&A questions will be answered
items.summary: Leaders from Coinbase, M13, and Mignano Law Group talk about how M&A is an early-stage strategy at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Register to hear this live.
